case_title: ARDON, MANUEL A. vs. MOSES SAVEO, IND DBA MOSES JANITORIAL SERVICE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARDON, MANUEL A. AS TO DEFENDANT MOSES SAVEO, IND DBA MOSES JANITORIAL SERVICE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARDON, MANUEL A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOSES SAVEO, IND DBA MOSES JANITORIAL SERVICE $2,335.45 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,415.45
